chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln Nos.1807 & 1808 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 27.08.2025 Mr. Liaquat Ali Khaskheli, Advocate for the applicant. Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl. PG Sindh. ------------------------------- These matters are arising out of the offences registered under Section 397 PPC (Dacoity) and Section 23-1(A) of Sindh Arms Act (Firearm), respectively. Complainant Nisar Ahmed is not in attendance. To come up on 03.09.2025. Late Diary: After about half an hour of the passing the order orally and before the order could be signed, counsel for the applicant reappeared and submitted that he no longer wishes to press these bail applications and wants to withdraw the same. He further submits that the final challan has been submitted before the trial Court and permission may be granted to file a fresh bail application before the trial Court. These bail applications are dismissed as not pressed subject to all just legal implications. J U D G E Asif
